prompts.text: Build a cosmic pet simulator where you feed stars to a friendly alien creature and it grows new colors.
Create a drum pad you control with keyboard keys — each key plays a different silly sound effect.
Make a story spinner: click a button and it randomly picks a hero, a place, and a problem to solve.
Code a canvas game where you draw ramps and watch a ball bounce with fake gravity.
Build a weather app that shows emoji animations for sun, rain, snow, and thunderstorms.
